entries.source: We may amend Terms at any time by posting the amended terms on this site. It is your responsibility to review these Terms periodically. Your continued use of the Platform following the posting of revised Terms means that you accept and agree to the changes. You are expected to check this page frequently so you are aware of any changes, as they are binding on you. By continuing to access or use our Service after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, you are no longer authorized to use Service.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa amend shuruudo ee kasta waqti by posting amended shuruudo ku tan site. taas waa kaaga responsibility si dib-u-eegis kuwan shuruudo periodically. kaaga continued isticmaal ee madasha following posting ee revised shuruudo means taas aad accept iyo agree si changes. aad waa expected si hubi tan bog frequently so aad waa aware ee kasta changes, as iyaga waa binding ku aad. By continuing si access ama isticmaal keenna adeeg ka dib kasta revisions become effective, aad agree si noqo bound by revised shuruudo. haddii aad do ma agree si new shuruudo, aad waa no longer la oggolaaday si isticmaal adeeg.

entries.source: We may disclose personal information that we collect, or you provide: Disclosure for Law Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, we may be required to disclose your Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities. Business Transaction: If our subsidiaries or we are involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, your Personal Data may be transferred. Other cases. We may disclose your information also: to our subsidiaries and affiliates; to contractors, service providers, and other third parties we use to support our business; to fulfil the purpose for which you provide it; to include your company’s logo on our website; for any other purpose disclosed by us when you provide the information; with your consent in any other cases; if we believe disclosure is necessary or appropriate to protect the rights, property, or safety of the Company, our customers, or others.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa disclose shakhsi ah macluumaad taas annaga collect, ama aad provide: Disclosure loogu talagalay sharci Enforcement: Under certain circumstances, annaga waxaa laga yaabaa noqo required si disclose kaaga xog haddii required si do so by sharci ama gudaha response si valid requests by dadweyne authorities. ganacsi Transaction: haddii keenna subsidiaries ama annaga waa involved gudaha merger, acquisition ama asset sale, kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed waxaa laga yaabaa noqo transferred. Other kiisas. annaga waxaa laga yaabaa disclose kaaga macluumaad also: si keenna subsidiaries iyo affiliates; si contractors, Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga, iyo other third parties annaga isticmaal si support keenna ganacsi; si fulfil purpose loogu talagalay kee aad provide taas; si ku dar kaaga shirkad’s logo ku keenna mareeg; loogu talagalay kasta other purpose disclosed by us marka aad provide macluumaad; leh kaaga consent gudaha kasta other kiisas; haddii annaga believe disclosure waa necessary ama appropriate si protect xuquuq, property, ama safety ee shirkad, keenna customers, ama others.

entries.source: We may employ third party companies and individuals to facilitate our Service (“Service Providers”), provide Service on our behalf, perform Service-related services or assist us in analysing how our Service is used. These third parties have access to your Personal Data only to perform these tasks on our behalf and are obligated not to disclose or use it for any other purpose.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa employ dhinac saddexaad companies iyo individuals si facilitate keenna adeeg (“Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga”), provide adeeg ku keenna behalf, perform adeeg-la xiriira adeegyo ama assist us gudaha analysing sida keenna adeeg waa used. kuwan third parties hayso access si kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed only si perform kuwan tasks ku keenna behalf iyo waa obligated ma si disclose ama isticmaal taas loogu talagalay kasta other purpose.

entries.source: We may provide paid products and/or services within Service. In that case, we use third-party services for payment processing (e.g. payment processors). We will not store or collect your payment card details. That information is provided directly to our third-party payment processors whose use of your personal information is governed by their Privacy Policy. These payment processors adhere to the standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by the PCI Security Standards Council, which is a joint effort of brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express and Discover. PCI-DSS requirements help ensure the secure handling of payment information.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa provide paid products iyo/ama adeegyo within adeeg. gudaha taas kiis, annaga isticmaal dhinac saddexaad adeegyo loogu talagalay payment processing (e.g. payment processors). annaga wuu ma store ama collect kaaga payment card details. taas macluumaad waa provided si toos ah si keenna dhinac saddexaad payment processors whose isticmaal ee kaaga shakhsi ah macluumaad waa governed by their siyaasadda asturnaanta. kuwan payment processors adhere si standards set by PCI-DSS as managed by PCI amniga Standards Council, kee waa joint effort ee brands like Visa, Mastercard, American Express iyo Discover. PCI-DSS requirements caawin ensure secure handling ee payment macluumaad.

entries.source: We may terminate or suspend your account and bar access to Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, under our sole discretion, for any reason whatsoever and without limitation, including but not limited to a breach of Terms. If you wish to terminate your account, you may simply discontinue using Service. All provisions of Terms which by their nature should survive termination shall survive termination, including, without limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity and limitations of liability.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa terminate ama suspend kaaga account iyo bar access si adeeg immediately, la'aan prior ogeysiis ama liability, under keenna sole discretion, loogu talagalay kasta sababeey whatsoever iyo la'aan limitation, including laakiin ma limited si breach ee shuruudo. haddii aad wish si terminate kaaga account, aad waxaa laga yaabaa si fudud discontinue isticmaalka adeeg. dhammaan provisions ee shuruudo kee by their nature waa gudaha survive termination shall survive termination, including, la'aan limitation, ownership provisions, warranty disclaimers, indemnity iyo limitations ee liability.

entries.source: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We will let you know via email and/or a prominent notice on our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update “effective date” at the top of this Privacy Policy. You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa update keenna siyaasadda asturnaanta ka yimid waqti si waqti. annaga wuu notify aad ee kasta changes by posting new siyaasadda asturnaanta ku tan bog. annaga wuu let aad know via email iyo/ama prominent ogeysiis ku keenna adeeg, prior si change becoming effective iyo update “effective date” ee top ee tan siyaasadda asturnaanta. aad waa advised si dib-u-eegis tan siyaasadda asturnaanta periodically loogu talagalay kasta changes. Changes si tan siyaasadda asturnaanta waa effective marka iyaga waa posted ku tan bog.

entries.source: We may use remarketing services to advertise on third party websites to you after you visited our Service. We and our third-party vendors use cookies to inform, optimise and serve ads based on your past visits to our Service.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa isticmaal remarketing adeegyo si xayeysiin ku dhinac saddexaad websites si aad ka dib aad visited keenna adeeg. annaga iyo keenna dhinac saddexaad vendors isticmaal cookies si inform, optimise iyo serve xayeysiisyo based ku kaaga past visits si keenna adeeg.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to automate the development process of our Service.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa isticmaal dhinac saddexaad Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga si automate development process ee keenna adeeg.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service.

entries.source: We may use third-party Service Providers to show advertisements to you to help support and maintain our Service.
entries.value: annaga waxaa laga yaabaa isticmaal dhinac saddexaad Bixiyeyaasha Adeegga si show advertisements si aad si caawin support iyo maintain keenna adeeg.

entries.source: We reserve the right to withdraw or amend our Service, and any service or material we provide via Service, in our sole discretion without notice. We will not be liable if for any reason all or any part of Service is unavailable at any time or for any period. From time to time, we may restrict access to some parts of Service, or the entire Service, to users, including registered users.
entries.value: annaga reserve right si withdraw ama amend keenna adeeg, iyo kasta adeeg ama material annaga provide via adeeg, gudaha keenna sole discretion la'aan ogeysiis. annaga wuu ma noqo liable haddii loogu talagalay kasta sababeey dhammaan ama kasta part ee adeeg waa unavailable ee kasta waqti ama loogu talagalay kasta period. ka yimid waqti si waqti, annaga waxaa laga yaabaa restrict access si some parts ee adeeg, ama entire adeeg, si users, including registered users.

entries.source: We respect the intellectual property rights of others. It is our policy to respond to any claim that Content posted on Service infringes on the copyright or other intellectual property rights (“Infringement”) of any person or entity. If you are a copyright owner, or authorized on behalf of one, and you believe that the copyrighted work has been copied in a way that constitutes copyright infringement, please submit your claim via email to support@inspir.app, with the subject line: “Copyright Infringement” and include in your claim a detailed description of the alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA Notice and Procedure for Copyright Infringement Claims” You may be held accountable for damages (including costs and attorneys’ fees) for misrepresentation or bad-faith claims on the infringement of any Content found on and/or through Service on your copyright.
entries.value: annaga respect hanti aqooneed xuquuq ee others. taas waa keenna siyaasad si respond si kasta sheegasho taas nuxur posted ku adeeg infringes ku copyright ama other hanti aqooneed xuquuq (“Infringement”) ee kasta qof ama entity. haddii aad waa milkiilaha xuquuqda daabacaadda, ama la oggolaaday ku behalf ee hal, iyo aad believe taas copyrighted work leh been copied gudaha way taas constitutes copyright infringement, please submit kaaga sheegasho via email si support@inspir.app, leh maaddo line: “Copyright Infringement” iyo ku dar gudaha kaaga sheegasho detailed description ee alleged Infringement as detailed below, under “DMCA ogeysiis iyo Procedure loogu talagalay Copyright Infringement sheegashooyin” aad waxaa laga yaabaa noqo held accountable loogu talagalay damages (including costs iyo attorneys’ khidmadaha) loogu talagalay misrepresentation ama bad-faith sheegashooyin ku infringement ee kasta nuxur found ku iyo/ama iyada oo loo marayo adeeg ku kaaga copyright.

entries.source: We use cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on our Service and we hold certain information. Cookies are files with a small amount of data which may include an anonymous unique identifier. Cookies are sent to your browser from a website and stored on your device. Other tracking technologies are also used such as beacons, tags and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze our Service. You can instruct your browser to refuse all cookies or to indicate when a cookie is being sent. However, if you do not accept cookies, you may not be able to use some portions of our Service. Examples of Cookies we use:Session Cookies: We use Session Cookies to operate our Service. Preference Cookies: We use Preference Cookies to remember your preferences and various settings. Security Cookies: We use Security Cookies for security purposes. Advertising Cookies: Advertising Cookies are used to serve you with advertisements that may be relevant to you and your interests.
entries.value: annaga isticmaal cookies iyo similar raacraac technologies si track activity ku keenna adeeg iyo annaga hold certain macluumaad. cookies waa files leh yar amount ee xog kee waxaa laga yaabaa ku dar anonymous unique identifier. cookies waa sent si kaaga browser ka yimid mareeg iyo stored ku kaaga qalab. Other raacraac technologies waa also used such as beacons, tags iyo scripts si collect iyo track macluumaad iyo si improve iyo analyze keenna adeeg. aad wuu karaa instruct kaaga browser si refuse dhammaan cookies ama si indicate marka cookie waa ahaansho sent. However, haddii aad do ma accept cookies, aad waxaa laga yaabaa ma noqo able si isticmaal some portions ee keenna adeeg. tusaalooyin ee cookies annaga isticmaal:Session cookies: annaga isticmaal Session cookies si operate keenna adeeg. Preference cookies: annaga isticmaal Preference cookies si xusuusnow kaaga preferences iyo various settings. amniga cookies: annaga isticmaal amniga cookies loogu talagalay amniga purposes. Advertising cookies: Advertising cookies waa used si serve aad leh advertisements taas waxaa laga yaabaa noqo relevant si aad iyo kaaga interests.

entries.source: We went outside our planet. However, the most rapid and significant advancement was in communication and technology which has connected a global population of over 3 billion people.
entries.value: annaga went outside keenna planet. However, most rapid iyo significant advancement was gudaha communication iyo technology kee leh ku xiran global population ee over 3 billion dad.

entries.source: We will retain your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies. We will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of our Service, or we are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.
entries.value: annaga wuu retain kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed only loogu talagalay as long as waa necessary loogu talagalay purposes set out gudaha tan siyaasadda asturnaanta. annaga wuu retain iyo isticmaal kaaga Xogta Shakhsiyeed si extent necessary si comply leh keenna legal obligations (loogu talagalay tusaale, haddii annaga waa required si retain kaaga xog si comply leh applicable laws), resolve disputes, iyo enforce keenna legal agreements iyo policies. annaga wuu also retain Usage xog loogu talagalay internal analysis purposes. Usage xog waa generally retained loogu talagalay shorter period, except marka tan xog waa used si strengthen amniga ama si improve functionality ee keenna adeeg, ama annaga waa legally obligated si retain tan xog loogu talagalay longer waqti periods.

entries.source: When you create an account with us, you guarantee that the information you provide us is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Inaccurate, incomplete, or obsolete information may result in the immediate termination of your account on Service. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account and password, including but not limited to the restriction of access to your computer and/or account. You agree to accept responsibility for any and all activities or actions that occur under your account and/or password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account. You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you, without appropriate authorization. You may not use as a username any name that is offensive, vulgar or obscene. We reserve the right to refuse service, terminate accounts, remove or edit content, or cancel orders in our sole discretion.
entries.value: marka aad samee account leh us, aad guarantee taas macluumaad aad provide us waa accurate, complete, iyo hadda jira ee dhammaan times. Inaccurate, incomplete, ama obsolete macluumaad waxaa laga yaabaa result gudaha immediate termination ee kaaga account ku adeeg. aad waa responsible loogu talagalay maintaining confidentiality ee kaaga account iyo password, including laakiin ma limited si restriction ee access si kaaga computer iyo/ama account. aad agree si accept responsibility loogu talagalay kasta iyo dhammaan activities ama actions taas occur under kaaga account iyo/ama password, whether kaaga password waa leh keenna adeeg ama dhinac saddexaad adeeg. aad must notify us immediately upon becoming aware ee kasta breach ee amniga ama unauthorized isticmaal ee kaaga account. aad waxaa laga yaabaa ma isticmaal as username name ee kale qof ama entity ama taas waa ma lawfully la heli karo loogu talagalay isticmaal, name ama trademark taas waa maaddo si kasta xuquuq ee kale qof ama entity other ka badan aad, la'aan appropriate authorization. aad waxaa laga yaabaa ma isticmaal as username kasta name taas waa offensive, vulgar ama obscene. annaga reserve right si refuse adeeg, terminate accounts, remove ama edit nuxur, ama cancel orders gudaha keenna sole discretion.

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: marka aad paste notes u rogo AI, weydii taas si split broad fikrado u rogo kuwaas jobs. deck leh 18 gaar ah cards waa usually ka fiican ka badan deck leh 5 giant cards taas kasta contain whole faqradda.

entries.source: While using our Service, we may also collect the following information: sex, age, date of birth, place of birth, passport details, citizenship, registration at place of residence and actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details of documents on education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, information on bonuses and compensation, information on marital status, family members, social security (or other taxpayer identification) number, office location and other data. Payment Data. We may collect data necessary to process your payment if you make purchases, such as your payment instrument number (such as a credit card number), and the security code associated with your payment instrument. All payment data is stored by Razorpay. You may find their privacy notice link(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy
entries.value: inta isticmaalka keenna adeeg, annaga waxaa laga yaabaa also collect following macluumaad: sex, age, date ee birth, place ee birth, passport details, citizenship, registration ee place ee residence iyo actual address, telephone number (work, mobile), details ee documents ku education, qualification, professional training, employment agreements, macluumaad ku bonuses iyo compensation, macluumaad ku marital status, qoys members, social amniga (ama other taxpayer identification) number, office location iyo other xog. Payment xog. annaga waxaa laga yaabaa collect xog necessary si process kaaga payment haddii aad samee iibsiyo, such as kaaga payment instrument number (such as credit card number), iyo amniga code associated leh kaaga payment instrument. dhammaan payment xog waa stored by Razorpay. aad waxaa laga yaabaa find their privacy ogeysiis xiriiriye(s) here: https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://razorpay.com/privacy

entries.source: While using our Service, we may ask you to provide us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify you (“Personal Data”). Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to: Email address of Student and Parent First name and last name of Student and Parent Phone number of Student and Parent Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City School name Class Cookies and Usage Data We may use your Data to contact you with newsletters, marketing or promotional materials and other information that may interest you. You may opt-out of receiving any, or all, of these communications from us by following the unsubscribe link. Usage Data, We may also collect information that your browser sends whenever you visit our Service or when you access Service by or through any device (“Usage Data”). This Usage Data may include information such as your computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that you visit, the time and date of your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data. When you access Service with a device, this Usage Data may include information such as the type of device you use, your device unique ID, the IP address of your device, your device operating system, the type of Internet browser you use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.
entries.value: inta isticmaalka keenna adeeg, annaga waxaa laga yaabaa weydii aad si provide us leh certain personally identifiable macluumaad taas wuu karaa noqo used si contact ama identify aad (“Xogta Shakhsiyeed”). Personally identifiable macluumaad waxaa laga yaabaa ku dar, laakiin waa ma limited si: Email address ee arday iyo waalid koowaad name iyo last name ee arday iyo waalid Phone number ee arday iyo waalid Address, Country, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City dugsi name Class cookies iyo Usage xog annaga waxaa laga yaabaa isticmaal kaaga xog si contact aad leh newsletters, marketing ama promotional agab iyo other macluumaad taas waxaa laga yaabaa interest aad. aad waxaa laga yaabaa opt-out ee receiving kasta, ama dhammaan, ee kuwan isgaarsiin ka yimid us by following unsubscribe xiriiriye. Usage xog, annaga waxaa laga yaabaa also collect macluumaad taas kaaga browser sends whenever aad visit keenna adeeg ama marka aad access adeeg by ama iyada oo loo marayo kasta qalab (“Usage xog”). tan Usage xog waxaa laga yaabaa ku dar macluumaad such as kaaga computer’s Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, pages ee keenna adeeg taas aad visit, waqti iyo date ee kaaga visit, waqti spent ku kuwaas pages, unique qalab identifiers iyo other diagnostic xog. marka aad access adeeg leh qalab, tan Usage xog waxaa laga yaabaa ku dar macluumaad such as type ee qalab aad isticmaal, kaaga qalab unique ID, IP address ee kaaga qalab, kaaga qalab operating system, type ee Internet browser aad isticmaal, unique qalab identifiers iyo other diagnostic xog.

entries.source: World History at all points of time has been like zooming out of a picture, A picture that kept changing. The centuries leading up to the 19th century marked a turning point in human history, as the world moved from a flat, limited view of the world to a growing understanding of new territories and colonies. The French Revolution marked the first time when a large population gathered to protest and establish the ideals of liberty, equality, and fraternity. The events of World War II also shaped the world for the next century and laid the foundation for the 21st century.
entries.value: adduun taariikh ee dhammaan qodobbo ee waqti leh been like zooming out ee picture, picture taas kept changing. centuries leading up si 19th century marked turning qodob gudaha human taariikh, as adduun moved ka yimid flat, limited view ee adduun si growing understanding ee new territories iyo colonies. French Revolution marked koowaad waqti marka large population gathered si protest iyo establish ideals ee liberty, equality, iyo fraternity. events ee adduun dagaal II also shaped adduun loogu talagalay xiga century iyo laid foundation loogu talagalay 21st century.

entries.source: Yes, but the recommended workflow is hint-first. Use it to understand the method, check your work, and review errors instead of copying a final answer.
entries.value: Yes, laakiin recommended hab-socod waa tilmaan-koowaad. isticmaal taas si understand method, hubi kaaga work, iyo dib-u-eegis errors halkii ee koobiyeyn jawaab kama dambays ah.

entries.source: Yes, when it gives hints, checks reasoning, explains mistakes, and asks you to produce the final answer instead of writing it for you.
entries.value: Haa, marka ay bixiso tilmaamo, hubiso sababaynta, sharaxdo qaladaadka, oo kaa codsato inaad adigu soo saarto jawaabta ugu dambeysa halkii ay adiga kuu qori lahayd.

entries.source: Yes. {value1} opens as a public guest learning mode at {value2}, so you can start with a few free guest messages before creating an account.
entries.value: Yes. {value1} furaa as dadweyne guest qaab waxbarasho ee {value2}, so aad wuu karaa bilow leh yar bilaash guest messages ka hor creating account.

entries.source: Yes. A good workflow is to learn the foundation from a trusted lesson source, then use inspir to ask follow-up questions, practise recall, repair misconceptions, and plan what to review next.
entries.value: Yes. good hab-socod waa si baro foundation ka yimid trusted lesson il, kadib isticmaal inspir si weydii follow-up su'aalo, practise recall, repair faham-qaldanno, iyo qorshe waxa si dib-u-eegis xiga.

entries.source: Yes. A school can begin by testing public modes, then move toward a pilot or tailored deployment when the use case, content needs, and funding path are clear.
entries.value: Yes. dugsi wuu karaa begin by tijaabin dadweyne qaabab, kadib move toward pilot ama tailored deployment marka isticmaal kiis, nuxur u baahan, iyo funding jid waa cad.

entries.source: Yes. Audience pages link only to public guest modes, guides, prompt starters, learning paths, and AI-readable discovery files. Private saved chats remain excluded.
entries.value: Yes. bogagga dhagaystayaasha xiriiriye only si dadweyne qaababka martida, hagayaal, bilowyo prompt, jidadka waxbarashada, iyo AI-readable discovery files. wada-sheekaysiyo gaar ah oo la kaydiyey remain excluded.

entries.source: Yes. Category pages link into public guest modes, learning paths, and article clusters so learners can move from reading into tutoring, quizzes, flashcards, debate, planning, or feedback.
entries.value: Yes. Category pages xiriiriye u rogo dadweyne qaababka martida, jidadka waxbarashada, iyo maqaal clusters so ardayda wuu karaa move ka yimid akhris u rogo tutoring, su'aalo, Flashcards, dood, qorshayn, ama jawaab-celin.

entries.source: Yes. Code Tutor can explain concepts, walk through examples, ask you to predict behavior, and help you practice without turning learning into copy-paste.
entries.value: Yes. Macallinka code-ka wuu karaa sharax fikrado, walk iyada oo loo marayo tusaalooyin, weydii aad si predict behavior, iyo caawin aad tababar la'aan turning waxbarasho u rogo koobiye-paste.

entries.source: Yes. Exam Prep Planner can turn your topics, date, and available time into a practical revision sequence with practice and review.
entries.value: Yes. Qorsheeyaha Diyaarinta Imtixaanka wuu karaa u beddel kaaga mawduucyo, date, iyo la heli karo waqti u rogo wax ku ool ah revision sequence leh tababar iyo dib-u-eegis.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes let teachers test learning behavior before discussing a custom deployment.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida let macallimiinta tijaabi waxbarasho behavior ka hor discussing custom deployment.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Homework Coach, Socratic Instruction, quizzes, flashcards, and writing feedback open directly.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida such as Baro Wax Kasta, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga, Waxbarid Socratic ah, su'aalo, Flashcards, iyo qoraal jawaab-celin fur si toos ah.

entries.source: Yes. Public guest modes such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly from canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaababka martida such as Baro Wax Kasta, Waxbarid Socratic ah, Tababaraha Shaqo-guriga, su'aalo, iyo Flashcards fur si toos ah ka yimid canonical /chat/{topicSlug} URLs.

entries.source: Yes. Public mode URLs open directly in guest mode so a learner can start immediately, then create an account later if they want saved history or more usage.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaab URLs fur si toos ah gudaha qaabka martida so arday wuu karaa bilow immediately, kadib samee account later haddii iyaga rabto saved taariikh ama badan usage.

entries.source: Yes. Public modes work for school topics, professional skills, coding, research, projects, and personal study routines.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne qaabab work loogu talagalay dugsi mawduucyo, professional skills, code-qorid, cilmi-baaris, mashaariic, iyo shakhsi ah study routines.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic chats such as Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, quizzes, and flashcards open directly in guest mode.
entries.value: Haa. Chats mawduuc dadweyne sida Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, Homework Coach, su’aalo, iyo flashcards waxay si toos ah ugu furmaan hab marti.

entries.source: Yes. Public topic entrypoints such as /chat/learn-anything and /chat/socratic-instruction are intended to be indexable learning pages.
entries.value: Yes. dadweyne mawduuc entrypoints such as /chat/baro-anything iyo /chat/socratic-instruction waa intended si noqo la tusi karo raadinta waxbarasho pages.

entries.source: Yes. Quiz, Flashcard Builder, and Spaced Review are public modes designed for active recall and mistake repair.
entries.value: Yes. su'aal, Dhisaha Flashcards, iyo Dib-u-eegis Kala Fog waa dadweyne qaabab designed loogu talagalay xasuusin firfircoon iyo qalad repair.

entries.source: Yes. Reading Companion can simplify passages, ask questions, explain vocabulary, and help you identify the main claim and supporting evidence.
entries.value: Yes. Wehelka Akhriska wuu karaa simplify passages, weydii su'aalo, sharax eray-bixin, iyo caawin aad identify main sheegasho iyo supporting caddeyn.
